message: Hello Guys, i just wanted to say that our dear friend FGDHC1 is doing so-called "Arbeitszeitbetrug" while working!
Well, besides stealing the idea for a guest book from a friend and not having very good taste in music, he is alright. It also seems like he committed "Arbeitszeitbetrug".

Hi, I am the original inspiration for the guestbook :D Despite the not really tasteful music taste and his weird obsession with Farming Simulator he is a really cool guy (and a BIG nerd). Anyway he also likes to commit so-called "Arbeitszeitbetrug" on the daily
